en.title: E-commerce Platform
en.previewText: A full-featured online store with real-time inventory, payment processing, and an admin dashboard for managing products and orders.

en.title: Design System
en.previewText: A comprehensive component library and design system powering consistent user experiences across multiple products.

en.title: Analytics Dashboard
en.previewText: An interactive dashboard for monitoring key business metrics with real-time data streaming and customizable charts.

en.title: Mobile Fitness App
en.previewText: A cross-platform fitness tracking app with workout plans, progress analytics, and social features for community engagement.

es.title: E-commerce Platform
es.previewText: Una tienda online completa con inventario en tiempo real, pagos integrados y un panel administrativo para gestionar productos y pedidos.
es.imageAlt: Vista previa de una plataforma ecommerce

es.title: Design System
es.previewText: Una libreria de componentes y sistema de diseno pensados para mantener consistencia entre multiples productos.
es.imageAlt: Vista previa de un sistema de diseno

es.title: Analytics Dashboard
es.previewText: Un dashboard interactivo para monitorear metricas clave con datos en tiempo real y graficos configurables.
es.imageAlt: Vista previa de un dashboard analitico

es.title: Mobile Fitness App
es.previewText: Una app cross-platform de fitness con rutinas, analiticas de progreso y funciones sociales para impulsar constancia.
